hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git commit' || exit 0; cd /Users/felixgeelhaar/Developer/projects/open_source/scout && bash scripts/pre-commit.sh 2>&1; rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Pre-commit checks failed. Fix issues before committing."}}'; fi; }
hooks.statusMessage: Running pre-commit checks (gofmt, vet, lint, tests, coverctl, nox)...

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.go$' && gofmt -w "$f" 2>/dev/null; } || true

cd /Users/felixgeelhaar/Developer/projects/open_source/scout && bash scripts/pre-commit.sh 2>&1 | tail -20; ec=${PIPESTATUS[0]}; if [ $ec -ne 0 ]; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"Pre-commit checks failed. Fix the issues before stopping."}'; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Running pre-commit checks (gofmt, vet, lint, tests, coverctl, nox)...
